news.summary: A new 5kg artisan Gouda cheese infused with pumpkin spice was unveiled by Specialities Inc. at the Fancy Food Show in New York. Crafted in the Netherlands by Van der Heiden Kaas, this seasonal cheese combines licorice, ginger, and cinnamon flavors. Known for traditional cheese-making, the family business offers a rich and creamy Gouda with a unique twist.
news.headline: New autumn-inspired Gouda by Specialities Inc.: 5kg Pumpkin Spice Gouda with licorice, ginger, and cinnamon. Crafted in the Netherlands.

news.summary: In San Diego, Teradata has appointed Scot Rogers as their new Chief Administrative Officer.
news.headline: Teradata names Scot Rogers as Chief Admin Officer in San Diego.

news.summary: In Houston, Expro Group Holdings N.V. (NYSE: XPRO) has appointed Sergio Maiworm as Chief Financial Officer, starting June 30, 2025, replacing Quinn Fanning who is departing. This move is part of the company's strategy to align leadership with its growth objectives and is independent of financial or internal control concerns. The change is part of a larger initiative to position the company for future success.
news.headline: Expro Group Holdings N.V. appointed Sergio Maiworm as CFO effective June 30, 2025, replacing Quinn Fanning. No financial issues involved.

news.summary: In Miami, Element Solutions Inc (NYSE: ESI) revealed that CEO Benjamin Gliklich will take part in a fireside chat and Q&A at the Wolfe Research 2nd Annual Materials of the Future Conference in New York on June 17, 2025, 12:55 p.m. EST. The session will be live-streamed on www.elementsolutionsinc.com for investors. Element Solutions Inc stands as a prominent industry player.
news.headline: Element Solutions Inc will participate in Wolfe Research's Materials of the Future Conference on June 17, 2025 at 12:55 p.m EST. CEO Benjamin Gliklich to host fireside chat. Live webcast available.

news.summary: Houston-based NextDecade Corporation (NASDAQ: NEXT) has completed a pricing update for its lump-sum, turnkey engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) contract with Bechtel Energy Inc. The refresh includes agreements for the construction of Train 4 and associated infrastructure at the Rio Grande LNG Facility. Additionally, a new lump-sum, turnkey EPC contract has been signed with Bechtel for the construction of Train 5 and related infrastructure. These developments mark significant progress for NextDecade, a major player in the energy sector.
news.headline: NextDecade Corp finalizes EPC contract refresh for Train 4 and signs EPC contract for Train 5 at Rio Grande LNG Facility.

news.summary: TUSTIN, California - Rick Matros, Chair and CEO of Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. (Nasdaq: SBRA), expressed gratitude to Clifton J. Porter II for his five-year tenure on the Company's Board. Matros acknowledged Porter's valuable contributions, praising his insights and expertise that benefitted the Board and leadership team. Matros extended his appreciation on behalf of the Board of Directors for Porter's exemplary service to Sabra.
news.headline: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. expresses gratitude to Clifton J. Porter II for five years of board service. CEO Rick Matros appreciates his valuable contributions.

news.summary: A recent research brief by the BlueGreen Alliance states that over 2 million jobs within the manufacturing sector are in jeopardy due to the budget reconciliation bill approved by the U.S. House of Representatives. The bill aims to eliminate tax credits for clean and advanced manufacturing, rendering them ineffective and expiring prematurely. According to the brief, around 300,000 direct manufacturing jobs in clean manufacturing tax credit-supported facilities, as well as over 1 million indirect jobs, are at risk if the House bill passes into law. Visit Benzinga.com for more details on this story.
news.headline: Over 2M jobs in manufacturing at risk if clean manufacturing tax credits repealed by US House bill.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, Washington, June 12, 2025 – Northwest Pipe Company, a prominent water infrastructure products manufacturer traded on Nasdaq under the symbol NWPX, has unveiled its revamped corporate identity as NWPX. The updated name and rebranding signify the company's development, creativity, and forward-looking strategy.
news.headline: Northwest Pipe Company (Nasdaq: NWPX) changes its name to NWPX to reflect growth and innovation.

news.summary: Equifax® has announced the acquisition of 35 new patents in the first six months of 2025. The patents are aimed at promoting responsible AI innovation and enhancing customer insights. This development is expected to drive more effective solutions for customers, contributing to the company's commitment to advancing technology.
news.headline: Equifax obtains 35 patents in 2025 for AI & fraud solutions, enhancing customer insights. Responsible innovation drive.

news.summary: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated (NYSE: ELAN) revealed plans to have Zenrelia™ (ilunocitinib) approved and available in the market before the conclusion of the third quarter of this year. The company's recent announcement stated that the European Medicines has provided a favorable opinion on Zenrelia™. This news comes as a significant milestone for Elanco Animal Health as they work towards introducing the product to consumers.
news.headline: Elanco gets green light for Zenrelia (ilunocitinib) in EU, expected in Q3 2025. Company excited for approval and launch.

news.summary: Carrier Global Corporation, a leading global provider of intelligent climate and energy solutions based in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla., revealed today that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.225 for each outstanding share of Carrier common stock. This decision signifies the company's commitment to providing value to its shareholders and highlights its financial stability and growth in the market. This move is a testament to Carrier's strong position in the industry and its dedication to rewarding investors with a return on their investment.
news.headline: Carrier Global Corp (NYSE: CARR) declares $0.225 quarterly dividend for its common stock - key update from Board of Directors.

news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina, in a press release dated June 12, 2025 -- Bank of America Corporation revealed that its Board of Directors approved regular cash dividends for the outstanding shares or depositary shares from specific preferred stock series. The announced dividends per share for the mentioned series are as follows: Series of Preferred Stock and the respective dividend per share.
news.headline: Bank of America authorizes dividends on preferred stock in July and August 2025. Charlotte, June 12, 2025.

news.summary: On 11 June 2025, UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" concluded a public offering with FMĮ “Orion securities” where they successfully placed 32.274 million Euros worth of Green Bonds in the first series and first tranche, offering an 8.0% yield. This was done under their 100 million Euros unsecured fixed-interest note programme, with the base prospectus receiving approval from the Bank of Lithuania on 27 May 2025. The move highlights the Company's commitment to the Baltic market through a Green Bond Programme. The funds raised from this issuance will go towards refinancing existing bonds with the ISIN LT0000405938.
news.headline: UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" issued 32.274 MEUR Green Bonds at 8.0% yield to refinance existing bonds.

news.summary: In Corte Madera, California, RH (NYSE: RH) has disclosed its financial performance for Q1 ending on May 3, 2025, through a shareholder letter from Chairman and CEO Gary Friedman. The letter is accessible on the Investor Relations segment of the company's website at ir.rh.com. RH's management will conduct a live conference call and audio webcast today at 2:00 pm PT (5:00 pm ET) as previously communicated. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing 800.715.9871 or 646.
news.headline: RH released Q1 fiscal 2025 results, ended May 3, 2025. Live webcast scheduled at 2pm Pacific Time (5pm Eastern Time).

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 15%, with over 10 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the inflation rate has risen to 5.2%, the highest it has been in the past decade. The government has announced plans to address these concerning figures through various economic initiatives and policies.
news.headline: Harvard presses for court to uphold block on Trump's policy targeting international students

news.summary: Build-A-Bear Workshop, Inc. revealed today that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.22 for each share of common stock outstanding (NYSE: BBW). This dividend is set to be distributed on July 10, 2025, to shareholders recorded by June 26, 2025. Build-A-Bear, established in 1997, has grown into a cherished multi-generational brand with a commitment to enhancing life with more warmth and compassion, catering to visitors of all ages.
news.headline: Build-A-Bear Workshop declares $0.22/ share quarterly dividend, to be paid on July 10, 2025 to shareholders as of June 26.

news.summary: Hub Group, Inc. based in Oak Brook, Illinois, disclosed today that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.125 for each share of its Class A and Class B Common Stock. Shareholders of record as of June 23, 2025, will receive the dividend on June 30, 2025. Hub Group, Inc. is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol HUBG.
news.headline: Hub Group declares quarterly dividend of $0.125 per share on Class A and Class B Common Stock, payable on June 30 to stockholders of record by June 23.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, New York Mortgage Trust, Inc. (Nasdaq: NYMT) disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend totaling $0.20 per share on its common stock for the quarter closing on June 30, 2025. The dividend is set to be distributed on July 30, 2025, to common stockholders who are officially listed as of June 23, 2025, end of business day.
news.headline: New York Mortgage Trust declares $0.20 per share dividend for Q2 2025, payable on July 30.

news.summary: Minneapolis-based company NOG has announced its plans to reopen $200 million worth of 3.625% Convertible Senior Notes due in 2029.
news.headline: NOG plans to reopen 3.625% Convertible Senior Notes Due 2029 in Minneapolis.

news.summary: Absecon Bancorp, the bank holding company of First National Bank of Absecon in New Jersey, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.90 per share on June 12, 2025. This dividend will be payable on June 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 20, 2025. The Company (traded as ASCN on the OTC) continues to strengthen its commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.
news.headline: Absecon Bancorp declares $0.90 per share dividend for Q2, to be paid on June 30, 2025.

news.summary: The bill proposed by President Trump, with a significant amount of debt, has the potential to accelerate the decline in the value of the US dollar. As inflation is expected to rise, Bitcoin is emerging as a viable hedge against this trend, offering a secure investment option for individuals seeking to protect their assets.
news.headline: Trump's significant bill may lead to US debt crisis, increasing inflation. Bitcoin could benefit from the turmoil.

news.summary: Before joining the team at Alchemy Pay, David Plouffe served as an advisor to a number of notable organizations, including Binance. Additionally, he has worked on the presidential campaigns of former President Barack Obama and former Vice President Kamala Harris.
news.headline: Former Kamala Harris campaign adviser David Plouffe joins Coinbase advisory council after advising other prominent figures and companies.

news.summary: In a leadership development program held in Washington on June 12, 2025, Tammy Barlet, the Vice President of Government Affairs at Student Veterans of America (SVA), was selected as one of 37 scholars for the program. This initiative aims to bring SVA's veteran advocacy mission to the forefront and enhance leadership skills.
news.headline: Tammy Barlet of SVA named Bush Institute Stand-To Veteran Leadership Program Scholar, 37 scholars selected.

news.summary: In Denver, Voyager Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: VOYG) has successfully completed its initial public offering of 14,200,645 shares of Class A common stock, with an additional 1,852,258 shares purchased by underwriters at $31.00 per share. The total proceeds generated from this offering amount to roughly $402.3 million after accounting for underwriting discounts and fees.
news.headline: Voyager Technologies Inc. closes IPO of 14,200,645 shares for $31 each, raising $402.3 million in net proceeds.
